# ParagonNodeInfo.Rarity property

The raw [`ParagonRarity`](../ParagonRarity.md) (`eRarityOverride`). Distinct from [`Kind`](./Kind.md): a rare node has [`Kind`](./Kind.md)=Rare AND `Rarity`=Rare; a Start node has [`Kind`](./Kind.md)=Start but `Rarity`=Common.

```csharp
public ParagonRarity Rarity { get; set; }
```
